content: Official docs and direct local verification show moon info --target all --frozen generates pkg.generated.mbti public interfaces. On the pinned toolchain six mb-core interface files were byte-stable across two consecutive runs. The CLI exposes generation but no documented semantic-compatibility diff command, so v0.2 should commit normalized generated baselines and enforce a project-owned structural/byte diff plus explicit SemVer classification; regenerate only under an intentional compatibility update.
